proposal.hypothesis: Parametric variant of mean_reversion archetype mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
proposal.exit_logic: close crosses bollinger.middle or rsi crosses 50

variants.builder_text:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
archetype: mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
family: mean_reversion
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
  - bollinger(period=34, std_dev=2.8)
  - rsi(period=7)
  - atr(period=14)
entry:
  - long: close < bollinger.lower and rsi < 30
  - short: close > bollinger.upper and rsi > 70
exit:
  - condition: close crosses bollinger.middle or rsi crosses 50
risk:
  stop_atr_mult: 1.75
  tp_atr_mult: 3.5
  description: ATR stop-loss (1.75x) and take-profit (3.5x)
constraints:
  - no_lookahead: true
  - only_registry_indicators: true

family: mean_reversion
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
  - bollinger(period=22, std_dev=2.5)
  - rsi(period=20)
  - atr(period=14)
entry:
  - long: close < bollinger.lower and rsi < 35
  - short: close > bollinger.upper and rsi > 70
exit:
  - condition: close crosses bollinger.middle or rsi crosses 50
risk:
  stop_atr_mult: 2.25
  tp_atr_mult: 4.5
  description: ATR stop-loss (2.25x) and take-profit (4.5x)
constraints:
  - no_lookahead: true
  - only_registry_indicators: true

proposal.hypothesis: Parametric variant of mean_reversion archetype mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
proposal.exit_logic: close crosses bollinger.middle or rsi crosses 50

  tp_atr_mult: 4.5
  description: ATR stop-loss (2.0x) and take-profit (4.5x)
constraints:
  - no_lookahead: true
  - only_registry_indicators: true

proposal.hypothesis: Parametric variant of momentum archetype momentum_macd
proposal.entry_long_logic: macd.macd crosses_above macd.signal and rsi > 40 and rsi < 65
proposal.entry_short_logic: macd.macd crosses_below macd.signal and rsi > 30 and rsi < 60
proposal.exit_logic: macd.histogram changes sign or rsi > 80 or rsi < 20

variants.builder_text:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: momentum_macd
archetype: momentum_macd
family: momentum
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
  - macd(fast_period=13, slow_period=33, signal_period=7)
  - rsi(period=7)
  - atr(period=14)
entry:
  - long: macd.macd crosses_above macd.signal and rsi > 40 and rsi < 65
  - short: macd.macd crosses_below macd.signal and rsi > 30 and rsi < 60
exit:
  - condition: macd.histogram changes sign or rsi > 80 or rsi < 20
risk:
  stop_atr_mult: 2.0
  tp_atr_mult: 5.5
  description: ATR stop-loss (2.0x) and take-profit (5.5x)
constraints:
  - no_lookahead: true
  - only_registry_indicators: true

proposal.hypothesis: Parametric variant of momentum archetype momentum_macd
proposal.entry_long_logic: macd.macd crosses_above macd.signal and rsi > 45 and rsi < 80
proposal.entry_short_logic: macd.macd crosses_below macd.signal and rsi > 30 and rsi < 60
proposal.exit_logic: macd.histogram changes sign or rsi > 80 or rsi < 20

variants.builder_text:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: momentum_macd
archetype: momentum_macd
family: momentum
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
  - macd(fast_period=9, slow_period=20, signal_period=7)
  - rsi(period=14)
  - atr(period=14)
entry:
  - long: macd.macd crosses_above macd.signal and rsi > 45 and rsi < 80
  - short: macd.macd crosses_below macd.signal and rsi > 30 and rsi < 60
exit:
  - condition: macd.histogram changes sign or rsi > 80 or rsi < 20
risk:
  stop_atr_mult: 2.0
  tp_atr_mult: 5.0
  description: ATR stop-loss (2.0x) and take-profit (5.0x)
constraints:
  - no_lookahead: true
  - only_registry_indicators: true
